CREATE TABLE test_nothing (id UInt32, value Nullable(Nothing));
INSERT INTO test_nothing VALUES (1, NULL), (2, NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, arr Array(Nothing));
SELECT id FROM test_arrays WHERE arr = array();
WITH (array()) AS empty_array SELECT count() FROM test_arrays WHERE arr = empty_array;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, val Nullable(Nothing));
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (1, NULL), (2, NULL);
SELECT t1.id FROM test_nothing t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT (SELECT count() FROM test_nothing WHERE value IS NULL) AS null_count;
SELECT countIf(value IS NULL) FROM test_nothing;
CREATE TABLE join_test (id UInt32, data Nullable(Nothing));
INSERT INTO join_test VALUES (1, NULL), (2, NULL);
SELECT t1.id, t2.id FROM test_nothing t1 LEFT JOIN join_test t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.data IS NULL;
